**Email Tools Suite** ‚ÄĒ Free, open source, offline-first

## ūüď¶ What's Included

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `BulkEmailSender.exe` | Send personalised bulk emails via your own email account |
| `EmailCSVMaker.exe` | Build and manage your contact lists with custom fields |

Both tools work together ‚ÄĒ build your list in the CSV Maker and launch straight into the Email Sender with one click.

---

## ‚¨áÔłŹ Download

**[‚Üí Download Latest Release](https://github.com/letustec-oss/LetUsTech/releases/latest)**

1. Download `LetUsTech_Email_Tools_Windows.zip`
2. Extract the zip
3. Run either `.exe` ‚ÄĒ no installation, no Python needed

> **Windows 10 / 11 only.** Both files must stay in the same folder.

---

## ‚ú® Features

### Bulk Email Sender
- ūüďß Send to unlimited contacts via your own Gmail, Outlook, or any SMTP provider
- ūüŹ∑ÔłŹ **Merge tags** ‚ÄĒ personalise every email with `{{first_name}}`, `{{company}}` etc.
- ūüďč **18 pre-built templates** ‚ÄĒ cold outreach, follow-up, newsletter, invoice reminder and more
- ūüĒć **Tag Inspector** ‚ÄĒ preview exactly how each contact's email will look before sending
- ‚úŹÔłŹ **Rich text editor** ‚ÄĒ bold, italic, font size, colours, bullet lists, alignment
- ūüĒī **Spell checker** ‚ÄĒ live red underlines, click to see suggestions
- ūüé® **6 themes** ‚ÄĒ LetUsTech Green, Midnight Blue, Crimson, Purple Haze, Amber Terminal, Light Mode
- ūüĒí **Encrypted credentials** ‚ÄĒ your app password is never stored in plain text
- ūüďä **Live send log** ‚ÄĒ real-time progress with sent/failed counts
- ūüĒĀ **Auto-reconnect** ‚ÄĒ recovers from dropped connections mid-campaign

### Email CSV Maker
- ‚ěē Add contacts manually or paste in bulk
- ūüŹ∑ÔłŹ Tag reference panel ‚ÄĒ see exactly which `{{tags}}` match your columns
- ūüĒß Custom fields ‚ÄĒ add phone, company, or any field you need
- ‚úÖ Email validation ‚ÄĒ invalid addresses highlighted in red
- ūüď• Import / export CSV ‚ÄĒ works with any existing spreadsheet
- ‚Ė∂ÔłŹ **One-click launch** ‚ÄĒ opens Email Sender with contacts pre-loaded

---

## ūüöÄ Quick Start

### 1. Set up Gmail (first time only)

Gmail requires an **App Password** ‚ÄĒ not your normal password:

1. Go to [myaccount.google.com](https://myaccount.google.com)
2. **Security** ‚Üí **2-Step Verification** (must be ON)
3. Search **"App Passwords"** ‚Üí Generate one for Mail
4. Copy the 16-character password

Then in the Email Sender:
- Click **‚öô Settings** ‚Üí **ūüďß SMTP tab**
- Click **Use** next to Gmail (auto-fills host/port)
- Enter your Gmail address and App Password
- Click **Test Connection** ‚Üí **Save All Settings**

### 2. Build your contact list

Open `EmailCSVMaker.exe`:
- Add contacts manually or paste a list
- Add custom fields (phone, company, location etc.)
- Click **‚Ė∂ Open in Email Sender**

Or import an existing `.csv` directly in the Email Sender.

### 3. Write and send

- Pick a **Template** or write from scratch
- Use merge tags to personalise ‚ÄĒ the tag panel shows all available tags
- Use **ūüĒć Tag Inspector** to preview each contact's email
- Hit **‚Ė∂ SEND CAMPAIGN**

---

## ūüŹ∑ÔłŹ Merge Tags Reference

| Tag | What it inserts |
|-----|----------------|
| `{{first_name}}` | Contact's first name (from CSV) |
| `{{email}}` | Contact's email address |
| `{{company}}` | Contact's company (from CSV) |
| `{{company_name}}` | Your company name (from Settings) |
| `{{sender_name}}` | Your name (from Settings) |
| `{{sender_role}}` | Your job title (from Settings) |
| `{{signature}}` | Your email signature (from Settings) |
| `{{company_website}}` | Your website (from Settings) |
| `{{any_csv_column}}` | Any column name from your CSV |

Tags are **case-insensitive** ‚ÄĒ `{{First_Name}}` and `{{first_name}}` both work.

---

## ‚öôÔłŹ SMTP Provider Settings

| Provider | Host | Port | Security |
|----------|------|------|----------|
| Gmail | `smtp.gmail.com` | 587 | STARTTLS |
| Outlook / Hotmail | `smtp.office365.com` | 587 | STARTTLS |
| Yahoo | `smtp.mail.yahoo.com` | 587 | STARTTLS |
| iCloud | `smtp.mail.me.com` | 587 | STARTTLS |
| Zoho | `smtp.zoho.com` | 587 | STARTTLS |

These are also listed inside the app under Settings ‚Üí SMTP with one-click **Use** buttons.

---

## ūüĒí Privacy & Security

- App passwords are **encrypted** using a machine-specific key ‚ÄĒ never stored in plain text
- Config file (`.letustech_email_config.enc`) cannot be read on another machine
- No data is sent to LetUsTech ‚ÄĒ everything runs locally on your machine
- Use **Settings ‚Üí ūüĒí Privacy** to clear saved credentials or wipe all data

---

## ūüõ†ÔłŹ Build From Source

Requires Python 3.10+

```bash
# Install dependencies
pip install customtkinter pyspellchecker pillow cryptography pyinstaller

# Build both tools
build.bat        # Windows
./build.sh       # Mac / Linux
```

Output files appear in `LetUsTech_Email_Tools\`

---

## ūüďĀ File Structure

```
letustech-email-tools/
  ‚Ēú‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ BulkEmailSender.py        # Main email sending app
  ‚Ēú‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ email_csv_maker.py        # Contact list builder
  ‚Ēú‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ build.bat                 # Windows build script
  ‚Ēú‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ build.sh                  # Mac/Linux build script
  ‚Ēú‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ README.md
  ‚Ēú‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ .gitignore
  ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ .github/
      ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ workflows/
          ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ build_email_tools.yml   # Auto-build on GitHub Actions
```

---

## ūüďĚ Changelog

### email-v1.0.0
- Initial release
- Bulk Email Sender with full SMTP support
- Email CSV Maker with tag reference panel
- 18 email templates
- Spell checker with click-to-fix suggestions
- Tag Inspector for previewing personalised emails
- Encrypted credential storage
- 6 UI themes
- Settings window with Company, SMTP, Defaults, Branding and Privacy tabs
- GitHub Actions auto-build
